ops.text:
E19.B CLOSE (paired analysis completed by the orchestrator from disk artifacts — the driver died after scoring landed 07-19 16:21; per-row votes at out/arms/{baseline-v6,c003m2}/arm.json, analysis persisted at out/e19b-paired-analysis.json).

Paired result on the 125-row contested panel (fresh opus references, sonnet-tier votes, fresh clone per arm): baseline-v6 accuracy 0.800 (100/125), c003-m2 0.792 (99/125), delta = −0.008. Discordant pairs: 11 c003-m2-only-right vs 12 v6-only-right; McNemar exact p = 1.0. Paired bootstrap 95% CI [−0.080, +0.072] (20k iters, seed 20260720) — includes zero, and |delta| = 0.008 << pre-registered MDE_paired = 0.059.

PRE-REGISTERED VERDICT: NULL. c003-m2 does not validate; the conditional opus disagreement-row check does not run (it was gated on a win).

Substructure (hypothesis-generating only, strata are small): c003-m2 wins exactly on its target strata — operational_directive 10/14 vs 6/14, new_task 4/5 vs 1/5 — but gives it back on direction (26/37 vs 29/37) and premature (5/8 vs 8/8). The boundary rules trade errors across strata rather than removing them; net wash at panel level.

Consequence per the pre-registered ship rule: the prompt-cache restructure ships ALONE — structural system/user split only, JUDGE semantic content stays exactly v6; E19 closes with no prompt-content change. Spend: mint $10.11 + scoring est. ~$21 (driver died before reporting actuals; call envelopes preserved under out/capture-e19b/) of the $80 cap.
